title: Non-HOLD LLM decisions must cite real rule IDs and fit team profiles
description: Any non-HOLD decision must cite valid rulebook IDs and an applicable playbook ID. Team-profile OPEN_LONG and OPEN_SHORT tickets must also prove profile compliance.
llm_guidance: If no retrieved playbook fits, return HOLD. Never invent rule IDs. If a team profile is present, OPEN_LONG and OPEN_SHORT tickets must include profile_compliance_score, profile_compliance_summary, and profile_compliance_flags, and must use one of the team's preferred playbooks.
